title: Traefik Entry Point
description: A configured network entry point on a running Traefik instance, describing the listen address, transport-layer behaviour, and lifecycle timeouts.

name.description: Entry point name (e.g. web, websecure, traefik).

address.description: Address Traefik binds the entry point to (e.g. :80, :443, :8080).

transport.description: Transport-layer behaviour for connections accepted on this entry point.

http.description: HTTP-level entry point overrides such as default TLS configuration and redirections.

proxyProtocol.description: PROXY protocol settings - permits trusted upstream proxies to convey client information.
